kontakter.beskrivelse: People on the project, grouped by discipline group.
kontakter.ingenKontakter: No contacts on the project yet.
kontakter.velgProsjekt: Select a project to see contacts.
hjelp.kontakter.tekst: A read-only overview of everyone on the project, grouped by discipline group. Tap a phone number to call or an email to send a message. Editing discipline groups and members happens under Settings → Document flow.
timer.autoFyll.tittel: The day has been filled in automatically
timer.glemtDag.tittel: Did you forget to end the day?
timer.glemtDag.hjelp: Estimated end: {{sluttTid}} (guessed) · {{timer}} h on {{antall}} rows — review and correct.
timer.manglerLonnsart.hjelp: Hours could not be filled in automatically because the company has no default wage type. Add hours manually with the correct wage type, or ask a company admin to set up a default wage type.
timer.manglerOvertid.hjelp: Regular hours were filled in, but the company has no overtime wage type, so overtime beyond the daily norm was not added. Add overtime manually, or ask a company admin to set an overtime level on a wage type.
timer.deltMidnatt.hjelp: Part of a shift that spanned two days.
timer.dagFinnes.notis: You already had an entry for this day — we opened it. Your project is ready to log time on.
timer.forKort.melding: The session was too short to count as work time (under 15 min after rounding). No hour rows were added.
timer.forKort.preFyltTittel: The session added no new rows
timer.forKort.preFyltMelding: The session was too short to add new hour rows, but the day sheet already has entries.
timer.appendSendt.melding: You have an entry for this day that has already been submitted for approval. The new session was not added. Open the sheet and tap “Reopen for editing” to change it.
timer.gjenaapne.hjelp: Pulls the sheet back from approval so you can add entries. Your manager won't see it again until you resubmit.
timer.gjenaapne.feilGodkjent: The daily sheet has already been approved by your manager — contact them to make changes.
timer.gjenaapne.feilNett: Requires a connection — try again when online.
timer.gjenaapne.bekreftTekst: The sheet goes back to draft so you can edit it. Your manager won't see it again until you resubmit it for approval.
timer.gjenaapne.laastAttestert: Your manager has approved at least one row — ask them to return the daily sheet so you can edit it.
timer.glemtDag.melding: Your day from {{dato}} is still open.
timer.hjelpBeskrivelse: Time registration lets employees on the construction site record work hours, overtime, travel time, machine usage, materials and expenses — all collected in one daily timesheet per workday.
timer.hjelpDagsseddelTekst: One timesheet per workday collects everything: work hours are automatically split into normal time and overtime based on the daily norm (7.5h). Supplements like overtime meals, night and weekend supplements are automatically suggested based on rules.
timer.hjelpGodkjenningTekst: The manager sees all employees' timesheets and approves or rejects. Approved timesheets cannot be modified. Expenses with receipt photos are approved simultaneously.
timer.hjelpEksportTekst: Approved timesheets are exported to payroll systems (Tripletex, Visma, CSV). Each pay type has its own column — normal hours, overtime 50%, overtime 100%, travel time and supplements.
timer.beskrivelse: Your daily sheets for this project. One row per workday.
timer.ingenSedler: No daily sheets in this period.
timer.kladdPaaminnelse: Unsent drafts: {{antall}}. Tap to submit for approval.
timer.lonnsartHint: Pay type is selected per time entry inside the sheet.
timer.banner.dagstotal: You've registered {{timer}}h today across {{antall}} daily sheet(s)
timer.mine.beskrivelse: Personal overview of your hour history across projects.
timer.mine.ingenSedler: No daily sheets in selected period.
timer.nyBeskrivelse: Create a new daily sheet. You can add hour rows, supplements and details in the next step.
timer.nyHjelpetekst: You can edit everything after the daily sheet is created.
timer.detalj.ingenProsjektGrupper: No projects added yet. Click «Add project» to register hours.
timer.gruppe.tilByggherreHint: Subproject hours are sent to the client via the document flow module, not timer attestation
timer.arbeidstidIDagBeskrivelse: Sets total working hours. Used to calculate overtime.
timer.arbeidstidPrefyltHint: Pre-filled from your company's standard hours — adjust only if needed (e.g. a forgotten or split day). Log your hours on the rows below.
timer.vedlegg.lagreForst: Save the row first to attach a receipt.
timer.feil.ingenAktivitet: Select an activity before creating the daily sheet.
timer.feil.ingenProsjekt: Select a project before creating the daily sheet.
timer.detalj.aapnetEksisterende: You already had a daily sheet for this date — it has been opened here.
timer.detalj.ingenTimer: No hour rows. Add at least one before sending the daily sheet.
timer.detalj.slettBekreft: Are you sure you want to delete this daily sheet?
timer.detalj.ikkeFunnet: Daily sheet not found or you don't have access.
timer.detalj.returnertHjelp: Make corrections per the comment above and resend the daily sheet.
timer.ingenMaskinRader: No equipment use. Tap + to add.
timer.ingenUtstyr: No equipment — sync with server or contact company admin.
timer.feil.ugyldigMengde: Quantity must be greater than or equal to 0.
timer.felt.aktivitetDefaultHjelp: Used as default activity for new time rows. Each row can override.
timer.maskin.kapasitet: Work in group: {{arbeid}} h · machine so far: {{maskin}} h · available: {{ledig}} h
timer.maskin.overstigerArbeid: Machine hours exceed work hours for the group — reduce before saving.
timer.maskinSeksjon.kapasitet: Work in group: {{arbeid}} h · machine so far: {{maskin}} h · available: {{ledig}} h
timer.maskinSeksjon.hint: Machine hours are set equal to the work time. Did the machine run for less? Edit the machine row afterwards.
timer.ingenAktiviteter: No activities — sync with server or contact company admin.
timer.matpause.fjernTekst: No other eligible row to move the lunch break to. No break will be deducted for the day — are you sure?
timer.byggeplassMismatch.tekst: GPS placed you at {{byggeplass}} (project {{gpsProsjekt}}), but the sheet is on {{sedelProsjekt}}. Switch project or site if this is wrong.
timer.ingenLonnsarter: No wage types — sync with server or contact admin.
timer.ingenTillegg: No allowances — sync with server or contact admin.
timer.ingenTimerRader: No time rows. Tap + to add one.
timer.sendGodkjennHint: By sending, you approve your hours.
timer.bekreftSlettBeskrivelse: The sheet and all rows will be removed locally. If never synced to server, it disappears entirely.
timer.sync.offline: Offline — will sync when back online
timer.sync.venterEn: Waiting for sync — will send when back online
timer.sync.konfliktBeskrivelse: Server version won. Local changes were replaced.
timer.sync.avvistBeskrivelse: The sheet was rejected by the server and was not saved. Fix the error and save again, or delete the sheet.
timer.feil.minstEnTimerRad: The time sheet must have at least one time row before it can be sent.
timer.feil.ugyldigPause: Break must be a positive number (minutes).
timer.feil.sluttForStart: End time must be after start time.
timer.feil.fraTilPaakrevd: Start and end time are required on hour rows.
timer.feil.overlapp: The time range {{fra}}–{{til}} overlaps {{annenFra}}–{{annenTil}} on the same sheet. One worker cannot be in two places at once.
timer.feil.timerAvvik: The number of hours does not match the time span (expected {{forventet}} h). Adjust from/to or the hours.
timer.attestering.beskrivelse: Submitted daily sheets awaiting your approval. Return with a comment if corrections are needed, or approve to lock and snapshot prices.
timer.attestering.ingenSedler: No daily sheets awaiting approval right now.
timer.attestering.ingenTilgang: You don't have manager rights on this project.
timer.attestering.returnerBeskrivelse: Write a comment explaining what needs to be corrected. The employee will see the comment and can edit the daily sheet before resending.
timer.attestering.gjenaapne.beskrivelse: The daily sheet is approved. Reopening undoes the approval: the sheet returns to the approval queue and all rows are set to «pending» so you can review them again.
timer.attestering.kommentarPlaceholder: e.g. «Missing travel time», «Check break minutes», «Activity should be Warranty»
timer.attestering.kommentarPaakrevd: A comment is required when returning.
timer.attestering.detalj.ikkeRedigerbar: This sheet can no longer be edited ({{status}}).
timer.attestering.radValg.returnererAnta: You are about to return {{antall}} rows.
timer.attestering.redigerHint.tekst: Want the company to correct hours directly during attestation?
timer.attestering.uke.label: Week {{nr}}
timer.rediger.modus.beskrivelse: You are editing all pending rows on the sheet directly. Originals are kept for reference. Changes are recorded in the audit log.
timer.rediger.pause.label: Break
timer.rediger.pause.toggleHint: Add / remove break in this row
timer.rediger.brukDefaultHint: Replace manually adjusted value with calculated ({{timer}}h)
timer.rediger.maskinOverstigerMedPause: ⚠ Machine hours > work hours (break: {{pauseMin}} min) — operator pauses, machine runs
timer.rediger.feil.timerInkomplett: All timer rows must have project, wage type, activity and timer > 0.
timer.rediger.feil.tilleggInkomplett: All allowance rows must have project, allowance and quantity > 0.
timer.rediger.feil.maskinInkomplett: All machine rows must have project, machine and timer > 0.
timer.rediger.feil.manglerTid: From and to time are required on hour rows.
timer.rediger.feil.overlapp: The time range {{fra}}–{{til}} overlaps {{aFra}}–{{aTil}} on the same day sheet. One worker cannot be in two places at once.
timer.rediger.splittBekreft: You have unsaved changes that will be discarded. Continue?
timer.splitt.feil.minst2Rader: Split requires at least 2 rows. Use cancel if you do not want to split.
timer.splitt.feil.sumIkkeMatch: Sum of split rows does not match original. Adjust values until the indicator is green.
oppsett.attesteringImplisittAdmin: Admin has implicit time approval access via role
dokumentflyt.velgProsjekt: Select a project to see the document flow.
dokumentflyt.bekreftFlytBytteHjelp: The task moves over and the previous flow is left behind.
dokumentflyt.beskrivelse: Trade groups, document flows and roles
feil.navnPaakrevd: First name and last name are required
bekreftelse.slettBeskrivelse: Are you sure you want to delete this?
dokumentleser.ikkeKlar: The document is not ready for viewing yet. Try again shortly, or download the original.
oppgaver.ingenBeskrivelse: Create tasks to assign work to trade groups.
oppgaver.slettBekreftelse: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
sjekklister.ingenBeskrivelse: Create a checklist based on a report template.
sjekklister.slettBekreftelse: Are you sure you want to delete {{antall}} checklist(s)? This action cannot be undone.
sjekklister.feil.ingenFaggruppe: You are not a member of any trade group in this project, and the template has no creator trade group in the document flow. Ask a project admin to assign you to a trade group or create a document flow for the template.
mapper.velgMappe: Select a folder in the left panel to view its contents.
mapper.ingenTilgang: You do not have access to the contents of this folder.
okonomi.ingenPoster: No entries found. Import tender document to get started.
okonomi.velgKontraktForRapport: Select a contract to view report
okonomi.ingenAnotas: No A-Notes with header data found for this contract.
okonomi.importerAnotasPaaNytt: Re-import A-Notes to extract header values.
okonomi.dragOgSlipp: Drag and drop files here, or
okonomi.alleredeImportert: is already imported. First version is kept by default.
brukere.ingenLedigeFirmaBrukere: All company users are already members
brukere.ettersendBeskrivelse: Resend the invitation with an optional personal message.
brukere.ingenGrupper: No groups — create a new one
brukere.slettGruppeBekreftelse: Are you sure? All members will be removed from the group.
brukere.modulerBeskrivelse: Which modules the group has access to
brukere.bygningerBeskrivelse: Select which buildings the group has access to (all = default)
3d.klikkGulvKalibrer: Click on the floor in 3D to calibrate camera height
sok.skrivInnSokeord: Enter keywords to search project documents.
sok.klikkPaaTreff: Click a result to view document content.
sok.fallbackVarsel: AI search unavailable — showing text search.
sok.fallbackVarselFeilet: AI search failed — showing text search instead.
dashbord.ingenProsjekterBeskrivelse: Create a project to get started.
dashbord.ingenProsjekterForFirmaBeskrive: No projects for {{firma}}. Create a project to get started.
dashbord.ingenMineProsjekterBeskrivelse: You are not a member of any project yet. Switch to «All projects» to see the full company list.
impersonering.banner.melding: {{navn}} ({{firma}}) — you are viewing the app as this user.
byggeplassVelger.offline: No connection — building sites will be fetched next time you are online.
byggeplassVelger.prosjektMangler: The project has no building sites yet. They are created in Settings › Building sites on the web.
dashbord.venterPaaTilgangBeskrivelse: You don't have access to any projects yet. Contact your project manager.
dashbord.proveperiode: Trial expires in {{dager}} days. Contact SiteDoc to upgrade.
dashbord.proveperiodeDeaktiveres: The project will be deactivated soon.
moduler.beskrivelse: Activate predefined templates and workflows tailored to your project
moduler.deaktiverBekreftBeskrivelse: Existing templates and data are kept. You can reactivate the module later.
mappeoppsett.spraakBeskrivelse: Select which languages the documents in this folder should be translated to. The source language is always included.
mappeoppsett.spraakArvBeskrivelse: This folder inherits language settings from its parent folder. If no parent folder has custom language settings, only Norwegian is used.
mappeoppsett.kildesprakBeskrivelse: The language the documents in this folder are written in.
dokumentleser.velgSpraakOversett: Select a language to translate to
dokumentleser.ingenAlternativer: No alternative translations available. Add an API key in the module settings for Google Translate or DeepL.
dokumentleser.reOversetter: Re-translating the whole document — this takes a few minutes …
oversettelse.panel.omfang: Applies to {{n}} documents in this folder.
oversettelse.panel.omfangMedUnder: Applies to {{n}} documents in this folder + {{m}} in inheriting subfolders.
oversettelse.panel.roresIkke: Already translated documents are left untouched.
oversettelse.panel.modulInaktiv: The translation module is not active on this project.
tegninger.velgTegning: Select a drawing in the panel
tegninger.velgLokasjonOgTegning: Select a building site and drawing in the panel
aiSok.beskrivelse: Configure embedding model, LLM and search parameters
aiSok.recallBeskrivelse: High = weights meaning, low = weights exact words
aiSok.precisionBeskrivelse: High = prioritizes exact matches, low = broader results
aiSok.latencyBeskrivelse: High = prefers shorter documents, low = no preference
lokasjoner.geofence.beskrivelse: The center and radius are used to recognise the site via GPS. Calculated automatically from a georeferenced drawing, or overridden manually.
lokasjoner.geofence.ugyldig: Invalid coordinates — use numbers (or leave the fields empty to clear).
lokasjoner.geofence.geokodIngen: No match found for the address.
lokasjoner.geofence.kartHjelp: Click the map or drag the marker to set the center.
lokasjoner.ingenLokasjonerBeskrivelse: Create your first building site to start organizing drawings.
lokasjoner.slett.intro: You are about to delete «{{navn}}». This action cannot be undone.
lokasjoner.slett.bevaresTittel: The following data is preserved (only the building site tag is removed):
lokasjoner.slett.slettesTittel: The following data is permanently deleted with the building site:
lokasjoner.slett.ingenAvhengigheter: The building site has no dependent data.
lokasjoner.slett.suksessMedDetaljer: «{{navn}}» has been deleted. {{bevart}} items moved to project level, {{slettet}} items deleted.
firma.avdelinger.beskrivelse: Internal organizational division. Used for employee lists, export filtering, and equipment ownership.
firma.avdelinger.slettBekreft: Are you sure you want to delete the department «{{navn}}»?
firma.moduler.beskrivelse: Enable or disable company modules. Active modules sync to all projects the company is linked to.
firma.moduler.oppsettModal.tekst: {{modul}} is activated. Do you want to set it up now?
firma.moduler.deaktiverDetaljer: The module will be archived on all projects the company is linked to. Data is preserved — you can reactivate later.
firma.moduler.timer.beskrivelse: Time registration with daily timesheets, wage codes, supplements and approval. Export to payroll (Tripletex/Visma/PowerOffice) and project cost (ProAdm).
firma.moduler.maskin.beskrivelse: Equipment registry with vehicles, construction machines and small tools. Vehicle registry lookup, EU inspection, maintenance plan and equipment usage on timesheets.
firma.moduler.kompetanse.beskrivelse: Competence matrix with certifications, courses and HSE cards per employee. Activated as live module with expiry alerts and equipment usage validation.
firma.moduler.fremdrift.beskrivelse: Progress planner with resource planning, staffing and suggestion engine based on competence and project needs.
firma.moduler.varelager.beskrivelse: Material consumption per timesheet, inventory management and purchasing. Linked to project cost and ECO reporting.
firma.innstillinger.tidssone.beskrivelse: Time zone is used for timestamps in time registration, approval and reports.
firma.innstillinger.tilgangTimer.beskriv: Which employees can register timesheets on a new project by default. Can be overridden per project.
firma.innstillinger.tilgangVareforbruk.b: Which employees can register material consumption on a new project by default. Can be overridden per project.
firma.innstillinger.tilgangMaskinbruk.be: Which employees can register equipment usage on a new project by default. Can be overridden per project.
firma.innstillinger.tilgangVerdi.alle-an: All employees in the company can register without being explicit project members. Most flexible.
firma.innstillinger.tilgangVerdi.kun-pro: Only employees added as ProjectMember on the project can register.
firma.innstillinger.tilgangVerdi.sertifi: Only employees with relevant competence certificate (competence matrix) can register. Most restrictive.
firma.innstillinger.redigerVedAttesterin: Lets company administrators edit and correct daily sheets directly during attestation, without returning them to the employee. All changes are recorded in the audit log.
Suitable for industries where employees need help with time tracking.
firma.innstillinger.reise.beskrivelse: Travel between meeting point and construction site. Below the threshold the trip counts as working hours, above it as travel time on a separate pay type. Threshold and direction follow the company's collective agreement.
firma.innstillinger.reise.lonnsartHjelp: The pay type travel time is recorded on. Choose «Automatic» to match by name (travel/transport).
firma.innstillinger.reise.matriseBeskriv: Pre-compute the actual driving time from each office to each construction site, so travel suggestions on the day sheet use real times instead of an estimate. Also computed automatically when offices or site positions change.
firma.innstillinger.standardArbeidstid.b: Company default for a normal working day. Used as a prefill in time registration and as fallback when the calendar does not override the period.
firma.innstillinger.standardArbeidstid.p: How many hours into the shift the break starts. E.g. 4 h → a 07:00 start puts the break at 11:00. Works for night shifts too (21:00 start → 01:00).
firma.innstillinger.standardArbeidstid.t: Round from/to time on timer and machine rows to the nearest interval.
firma.innstillinger.standardArbeidstid.a: Warns at approval if a daily sheet exceeds this (WEA § 10-6: 13 h, 16 h under collective agreement). Warning only — does not block submission.
firma.ansatte.tomBeskrivelse: The company has no employees yet.
firma.ansatte.ansattnummerHjelp: Used in time reports and competence imports
firma.ansatte.firmaAdminHjelp: Grants access to company administration: employees, departments, modules and settings.
firma.ansatte.hmsAnsvarligHjelp: Grants access to the company-wide HSE dashboard across all projects in the company — without being a member of each project.
firma.ansatte.inviter.beskrivelse: The user is created in the company and can sign in with the matching email via Google or Microsoft.
firma.ansatte.nyNavPilot.beskrivelse: Turn the new navigation on or off for all {{antall}} employees in {{firmanavn}}. Each employee can still switch it themselves in the menu.
firma.ansatte.nyNavPilot.ferdigPaa: New navigation turned on for {{antall}} employees.
firma.ansatte.nyNavPilot.ferdigAv: New navigation turned off for {{antall}} employees.
nyttProsjekt.opprettesFor: The project will be created for {{firma}}. Switch company in the top menu to create on behalf of another company.
nyttProsjekt.ingenFirma: You must select a company in the top menu before you can create a project. All projects must belong to a company.
firma.kompetanse.beskrivelse: Competence matrix and competence types for the company. Certificates, courses, and training per employee.
firma.kompetanse.matrise.ingenAnsatte: No active employees in the company yet.
firma.kompetanse.matrise.ingenTyper: No competence types created yet. Go to the «Competence types» tab to add.
firma.kompetanse.typer.slettBekreft: Are you sure you want to delete «{{navn}}»?
firma.kompetanse.typer.slettBlokkertVars: {{antall}} employee record(s) are linked to this competence type. The delete will be rejected by the server. Remove employee records first.
firma.kompetanse.dialog.advarselUtlopFor: Warning: Expiry is before issued date.
firma.kompetanse.dialog.slettBekreftTeks: Delete «{{type}}» for {{bruker}}? This action cannot be undone.
firma.kompetanse.dialog.kunLesetilgang: You do not have access to edit this competence.
firma.kompetanse.import.steg1.beskrivels: Select a CSV or Excel file. Required columns: ansattnummer, kompetansetype. Optional: kategori, utstedt, utloper, utstederOrgan, sertifikatNr, notat. Max 5 MB.
firma.kompetanse.import.steg2.validering: Validation errors — must be fixed before import
firma.kompetanse.import.steg2.ukjenteAns: {{antall}} unknown employee numbers — import will be rejected atomically
firma.kompetanse.import.steg2.ukjenteTyp: {{antall}} unknown competence types — will be auto-created if allowed in next step
firma.kompetanse.import.steg2.duplikater: {{antall}} duplicates — will be skipped unless overwrite is selected
firma.kompetanse.import.steg3.sammendrag: {{antall}} new competence records will be created
{{antall}} new competence types will be created
firma.timer.beskrivelse: Wage type catalog, activities and supplements for time tracking. Used in daily sheets and payroll export.
firma.timer.attesteringIngenFirma: Select a company from the top menu to view the attestation list.
firma.timer.felt.kodeHint: Export code towards payroll system (Visma, Poweroffice, ProAdm). Empty = configure later.
firma.timer.felt.satsHint: Flat payout (per diem, mileage). Empty for hourly wage types.
firma.timer.felt.overtidsnivaaHint: Mark whether the wage type is overtime — used for automatic distribution of work time above the daily norm.
firma.timer.lonnsarter.beskrivelse: The wage type catalog is used when employees register hours. Three levels: Level 1 (statutory), Level 2 (construction package) and custom.
firma.timer.lonnsarter.ingen: No wage types yet. Activate the Timesheet module to seed Level 1.
firma.timer.aktiviteter.beskrivelse: Activity is a cost dimension (ProAdm) separating main work from warranty, extra work etc.
firma.timer.tillegg.beskrivelse: Supplements are added to the daily sheet outside the actual work hours (overtime meal, dirty work, on-call etc.).
firma.timer.onboarding.aktiverBeskrivels: Choose how the company will get started with time tracking. You can change everything afterwards via the catalog tabs.
firma.timer.onboarding.scenarioABeskrive: Auto-imports the statutory base package (Level 1). Default for new SiteDoc customers.
firma.timer.onboarding.scenarioBBeskrive: Empty catalog. Import your own wage types manually or via CSV (coming in a later round). Prevents duplicate catalogs.
firma.timer.onboarding.aktivertVarsel: The Timesheet module is activated for your company.
firma.timer.onboarding.importNivaa2Beskr: 25 industry-relevant wage types for construction (travel, per diem, shift premium, apprentice etc.). Can be imported at any time.
firma.timer.oppsett.beskrivelse: Complete the steps to start using the Timesheet module. You can move back and forth — steps are marked done automatically once they are in place.
Activate the mandatory base package (Level 1). This also seeds activities, supplements and expense categories so the next steps complete automatically.
firma.timer.oppsett.steg.aktiviteter.bes: Activities group time entries (e.g. construction work, machine hours, warranty). Open the activities page to add or adjust.
firma.timer.oppsett.steg.tillegg.beskriv: Supplements cover extra allowances (e.g. overtime meals, dirt allowance, standby). Open the supplements page to add or adjust.
firma.timer.oppsett.steg.utlegg.beskrive: Expense categories control how employees register expenses. They are seeded when you activate Level 1.
firma.timer.oppsett.steg.utlegg.merknad: No expense categories are registered yet. They are created automatically when you activate Level 1 in step 1.
firma.timer.oppsett.hjelp.hva: The wizard guides you through the steps to start using the Timesheet module. Each step is marked done automatically based on what the company has registered — you can jump freely between steps, and progress is not stored as a position but derived from the data.
firma.timer.rapport.modulIkkeAktivert.be: Activate the Hours module on the Modules page to use the hours report.
firma.timer.rapport.tom: No registered hours in the selected period.
faggrupper.ingenFaggrupperBeskrivelse: Add trade groups with document flow to manage approval and communication.
faggrupper.bekreftSlettFaggruppe: Are you sure you want to delete this trade group and all associated document flows?
faggrupper.bekreftSlett: Delete trade group «{{navn}}»? This cannot be undone.
faggrupper.bekreftSlettDokumentflyt: Are you sure you want to delete this document flow? Existing documents will not be affected.
faggrupper.velgMetode: Choose how to add a trade group:
faggrupper.kopierBeskrivelse: The structure from {{navn}} will be copied. Give the new trade group a name:
bibliotek.beskrivelse: Select checklists from the NS 3420 standard. Selected templates are imported to the project.
maler.ingenDokumentflytAdvarsel: The template will not be available until it is linked to at least one document flow.
maler.velgDokumentflytBeskrivelse: Choose which document flows this {{kategori}} template can be used with.
maler.ingenFaggrupperIProsjekt: No trade groups in the project
maler.type.label: Type
maler.hms.beskrivelse: Auto-routes to HMS coordinator and follows HMS access control
maler.hms.endringAdvarsel: Changing HMS status changes access control for existing documents from this template.
maler.hms.prefiksHint: The prefix looks like an HMS type — do you want to enable the HMS checkbox?
hms.subdomain.label: Type
hms.hjelp.avvik: Something has gone wrong — personal injury, material damage or HSE violation
hms.hjelp.sja: Risk assessment before hazardous work — signed by participants before work starts
hms.hjelp.ruh: Near miss or hazardous condition you observe — low threshold for reporting
hms.synlighet.label: Visibility
hms.synlighet.privatBeskrivelse: Only the reporter, recipient and HSE staff can see this document
hms.synlighet.apenBeskrivelse: All project members can see this document
hms.synlighet.endringAdvarsel: Changing visibility also affects existing documents from this template.
hms.tom.avvikBeskrivelse: Register a new incident via the New button above.
hms.tom.sjaBeskrivelse: Job Safety Analyses are created via the New button above.
hms.tom.ruhBeskrivelse: Hazard reports are created via the New button above.
maler.feilKonvertering: Cannot change type — there are {{antall}} existing documents linked to this template.
maler.ingenSjekklstemalBeskrivelse: Create a checklist template to build checklists in the project.
maler.ingenOppgavemalBeskrivelse: Create a task template to define task types in the project.
landing.heroBeskrivelse: SiteDoc is a complete reporting and quality management system for construction projects. Checklists, 3D models, AI search, economy and multilingual support — all in one platform.
landing.funksjonerTittel: Everything you need for quality management
landing.funksjonerBeskrivelse: From checklists and tasks to 3D models and AI document search — SiteDoc covers the entire workflow.
landing.sjekklisterBeskrivelse: Structured checklists with 23 report object types. Build templates with drag-and-drop on PC, fill in on mobile with photos and GPS.
landing.tegningerBeskrivelse: Upload drawings with metadata. Place tasks directly on the drawing — the mobile app uses GPS for automatic positioning.
landing.3dBeskrivelse: Upload IFC files and visualize building models in 3D. Split-view with drawing and model, GPS synchronization and section tools.
landing.aiSokBeskrivelse: Search across all project documents with AI. NorBERT model optimized for Norwegian construction documentation with semantic and lexical search.
landing.oppgaverBeskrivelse: Create from checklists, drawings or standalone. Full traceability with document flow.
landing.dokumentflytBeskrivelse: Documents flow between orderer and executor with 9 status levels and full traceability.
landing.spraakBeskrivelse: Switch language in the app — Norwegian, English, Polish, Ukrainian, Lithuanian and 8 others. Perfect for international teams.
landing.okonomiBeskrivelse: Payment certificates, budgets and deviation analysis. Import from Excel, compare entries and generate reports.
landing.bilderBeskrivelse: Camera with compression, GPS tagging and annotation. Syncs in the background.
landing.dokumenterBeskrivelse: Folder structure with access control. Upload PDF, DWG and IFC — automatic processing and searchable content.
landing.tilgangBeskrivelse: User groups, trade group access and disciplines. Admin sees everything, users see theirs.
landing.gpsBeskrivelse: Calibrate drawings with GPS. 3D synchronization and automatic positioning from mobile.
landing.plattformBeskrivelse: Use SiteDoc on PC for templates and administration, on mobile and tablet for field work. Everything syncs automatically.
landing.steg1Beskrivelse: Drag-and-drop with 23 field types and recursive nesting.
landing.steg2Beskrivelse: Mobile with photos, GPS, signature and offline support.
landing.steg3Beskrivelse: Document flow with 9 status levels and traceability.
landing.steg4Beskrivelse: PDF with all data, images and metadata.
landing.priserBeskrivelse: Try SiteDoc free for 14 days with full functionality. No credit card required.
landing.proveBeskrivelse: Perfect for testing the system in a real project.
landing.lisensBeskrivelse: Custom pricing based on project size and needs.
landing.ctaBeskrivelse: Log in with Google or Microsoft 365 and start your first project today.
landing.footer: Quality management for the construction industry

malbygger.kanIkkeSlettes: The field cannot be deleted because the following documents contain data for this field. Remove or clear the data in these documents first.

prosjektoppsett.rapportinnstillingerBesk: Control what is displayed on printouts and reports
prosjektoppsett.kildesprakBeskrivelse: The language the documents in this project are written in. Used for translation and language detection.

prosjektoppsett.utskrift.eksternProsjekt: External project number (shown instead of internal)
prosjektoppsett.aktivtBeskrivelse: The project is in active use
prosjektoppsett.arkivertBeskrivelse: The project is archived and read-only

mannskap.beskrivelse: Who is on the construction site now — §15 overview list.
mannskap.sokPlaceholder: Search name or HSE card no. …

psi.opprettBeskrivelse: Select a template and optional building to create a PSI.
psi.krevNySigneringBeskrivelse: Everyone who already signed must complete and sign the PSI again. Use only for significant changes.
psi.byttMalBeskrivelse: Switches to a completely different template. All existing signatures become invalid.
psi.kopierBeskrivelse: Copies the template to another building so you can customize it.
psi.bekreftSlett: Are you sure you want to delete this PSI? All signatures will be deleted.
psi.bekreftNySignering: Everyone who already signed must complete and sign the PSI again. Continue?
psi.bekreftByttMal: All existing signatures become invalid. All workers must complete the new PSI. Continue?
psi.qrBeskrivelse: Print and hang at the entrance. Workers scan with their phone to complete the PSI.
psi.ingenPsi: No PSI has been created for this project.
psi.velgBygningGjest: Which building will you be working at?
psi.ferdigBeskrivelse: You have completed and signed the safety instructions.
psi.bygningHarPsi: This building already has a PSI
psi.bekreftDeaktiver: The PSI will be deactivated. The template and signatures are preserved and can be reactivated later. Continue?
psi.gjesteBeskjedPlaceholder: E.g.: Guests without an HSE card must be accompanied by a responsible person at all times.
psi.gjesteBeskjedHjelp: Shown to guests who check «No HSE card». Saved automatically.
psi.hmsKortPaakrevd: HSE card number or «No HSE card» is required

opprettModal.manglerDokumentflytBeskrive: No document flow is configured for this template and trade group. Configure document flow in project settings.
hjem.velgFirmaUndertekst: You're a member of multiple companies — choose which one you're working with.
lokasjoner.velgProsjekt: Select a project to view building sites
lokasjoner.venterPaaGps: Waiting for GPS position. Try again shortly.
lokasjoner.gpsTillatelseInfo: Tap here to open Settings and enable location services
lokasjoner.ugyldigGeoref: The georeference has identical reference points. Set two different points on the drawing.
lokasjoner.gpsUtilgjengelig: GPS position unavailable. Try going outdoors or wait a moment.
lokasjoner.trykkPaaTegning: Tap on the drawing to place a marker
bekreft.endreStatusTil: Are you sure you want to change status to "{{status}}"?
feil.kunneIkkeEndreStatus: Could not change status. Try again.
felt.ingenFelter: No fields defined in the template for this repeater.
statushandling.mottakerHarLest: The recipient has already read this document. Do you still want to withdraw it?
dokumentflyt.inviterBeskrivelse: The person will be added to the project and this document flow, and will receive an invitation by email.
dokumentflyt.bekreftFjernRolle: Are you sure you want to remove this role and all its members from the document flow?
dokumentflyt.malDuplikatAdvarsel: This template is already attached to «{{flytNavn}}» for the same trade group. A trade group should not have two flows with the same template as this creates ambiguity when forwarding.
hjelp.firmaBeskrivelse: Your company is the organization that employs you (e.g. «Hansen Construction Ltd»). It follows you across all projects. Company managers can see all documents where their employees are involved.
hjelp.faggruppeOverskrift: Trade group = your role on this project
hjelp.faggruppeBeskrivelse: A trade group is your role on the project — e.g. Electrical, Carpentry or Client. When you send a checklist, you send it to a trade group (not individuals). One person can belong to multiple trade groups.
hjelp.firmaEksempel: Ola works for «Hansen Construction» (company), but on this project he's in the «Carpentry» trade group. On another project he might be «Site Manager». The company stays the same — the trade group varies by assignment.
hjelp.rolle.admin.beskrivelse: Project manager or site manager. Full access — can create trade groups, document flows and groups. Sees all documents regardless of trade group.
hjelp.rolle.firmaansvarlig.beskrivelse: Your boss or company leader. Sees documents where company employees are involved — but not documents between other companies. Can invite new employees from their own company.
hjelp.rolle.registrator.beskrivelse: A flow role (not project role) assigned in the document flow setup. Grants the right to send documents across trade groups — typically project secretary or coordinator.
hjelp.rolle.medlem.beskrivelse: Default role for all project participants. Sees and works with documents where their trade group is involved. An electrician only sees documents sent to the Electrical trade group.
hjelp.flytBeskrivelse: A document flow is a 'highway' that documents follow automatically between trade groups. You don't need to remember the next recipient — the system knows. E.g.: Electrical fills out checklist → sent to Client for approval → forwarded to Carpentry.
hjelp.flytForklaring1: A person with a blue dot gets automatic notifications when a document arrives. Not everyone needs notifications — only those actively working with the flow.
hjelp.flytForklaring2: Editor can fill out and send forward. Viewer can only see the document (for information). Set 'Viewer' when a trade group should only be informed.
hjelp.dokumentflytOppsett.hva: The control panel for who sends and receives documents in the project. Create trade groups (Electrical, Carpentry, Client) and connect them with document flows that determine the route documents follow.
hjelp.dokumentflytOppsett.eksempel: Ola creates the trade group «Electrical» and the document flow «Electrical → Client». Now Trude (electrician) can send checklists that automatically go to Per (client) for approval — without remembering who's next.
hjelp.dokumentflytOppsett.oppbygging: The page has three parts that build on each other. Start with trade groups, create document flows between them, and add members with roles.
hjelp.dokumentflytOppsett.faggruppeBeskr: Create trade groups and assign people. The trade group determines which document flows a person participates in. One person can belong to multiple trade groups.
hjelp.dokumentflytOppsett.dokumentflytBe: Create flows between trade groups and attach templates. Templates control which document types can be sent in the flow — e.g. only inspection reports between Electrical and Client.
hjelp.dokumentflytOppsett.medlemmerBeskr: Add people, groups or trade groups as participants. Assign roles (orderer, executor, approver) and permissions (editor/viewer). Remember blue dots on those who should be notified.
hjelp.lokasjoner.hva: Building sites are places in the project with associated drawings. Upload floor plans organized by floor, so users can place checklists and tasks directly on the drawing. This way everyone knows exactly where an issue was found.
hjelp.lokasjoner.tips: Create a building site — it is selected in the list automatically. Select a site and use the toolbar: «Geofence» sets the GPS centre (map or address search) for time detection, «Drawings» opens floor plans. Publish when ready; unpublished building sites are only visible to administrators.
hjelp.oppgavemaler.hva: Task templates are ready-made forms used when creating tasks. Instead of writing everything from scratch, users pick a template — e.g. «Deviation report» or «Complaint». Templates are attached to document flows to control who can use them.
hjelp.oppgavemaler.tips: Create templates for task types that repeat often. Use a prefix (e.g. «DEV») for automatic numbering. Attach the template to a document flow to restrict who can create tasks of this type.
hjelp.sjekklistemaler.hva: Checklist templates are forms with predefined questions and fields. The administrator creates the template once in the template builder, and everyone can reuse it. E.g. an inspection report with 25 questions — electricians just pick the template and fill it out.
hjelp.sjekklistemaler.tips: Use a prefix (e.g. «QA») for automatic numbering. Double-click a template to open the template builder. You can also fetch ready-made templates from the checklist library.
hjelp.moduler.hva: Modules are features you can toggle on and off for this project. A small project might only need checklists, while a large one needs everything. Turn off what you don't use — the menu becomes simpler for all participants.
hjelp.moduler.tips: Deactivated modules only hide the menu item — data is never deleted. You can toggle modules on and off at any time. Some modules (like Translation) require configuration after activation.
hjelp.psi.hva: PSI (Personal Safety Instruction) is a safety walkthrough visitors complete via QR code upon arrival at the construction site. Building regulations require project-specific safety instructions. Build the template with emergency procedures, PPE requirements, site plan and control questions.
hjelp.psi.qrBeskrivelse: Print the QR code and post it at the entrance. Visitors scan with their phone, complete the safety instruction and sign — without logging into SiteDoc. Each building can have its own PSI.
hjelp.psi.versjonBeskrivelse: When you update the PSI template (e.g. new emergency procedures), bump the version. Then everyone who already completed the old version must redo it — ensuring everyone is up to date on current safety rules.
hjelp.aiSok.hva: AI search lets you search project documents using plain language — e.g. 'Where does it say about hot water piping in block B?'. The system understands what you mean even if the words don't match exactly, finding relevant results across checklists, drawings and tasks.
hjelp.aiSok.embeddingBeskrivelse: The engine reads all documents and builds a search index. Choose local (free, on server) or cloud. After switching, you need to regenerate the index — this may take a few minutes depending on data volume.
hjelp.aiSok.vekterBeskrivelse: Adjust the balance: Recall (find as many matches as possible, may include some irrelevant), Precision (only relevant matches, may miss some), Latency (faster response, slightly lower quality).
hjelp.firmaer.hva: Administration of companies (organizations) in SiteDoc. Create companies, associate projects and configure integrations. Only accessible to SiteDoc administrators.
hjelp.firmaer.prosjekterBeskrivelse: Associate projects with a company to give the company admin oversight of employees' documents across projects. Projects without a company are 'standalone' — this is valid and doesn't need to be changed.
hjelp.firmaer.integrasjonerBeskrivelse: Connect the company to external systems. API keys are stored encrypted and never shown in plain text — only whether a key is configured.
kontrollplan.ingenPunkterBeskrivelse: Add control points to get started
kontrollplan.velgByggeplass: Select a building site to view the control plan
kontrollplan.kunPlanlagtSletting: Only planned points can be deleted
kontrollplan.modulIkkeAktiv: The control plan module is not enabled for this project
kontrollplan.importUgyldigFil: Invalid file — MS Project XML structure not found
kontrollplan.importDraSlipp: Drag and drop MS Project XML file here
kontrollplan.importSteg2Beskrivelse: The schedule contains resources (companies/people). Map each resource to a trade group in SiteDoc so the checkpoints get the correct responsible party.
kontrollplan.importIngenRessurser: No resources found in the file. Select a default trade group for all activities, or assign per group in the next step.
kontrollplan.importStandardFaggruppeHjel: Used for all activities without a resource
kontrollplan.importForklaring: Example: an MS Project resource "Carpenter AS" is linked to the "Carpenter" trade group in SiteDoc. Can't find a trade group? Create it directly from here.
kontrollplan.importManglerFaggruppe: {{antall}} resource(s) without a matching trade group
hjelp.kontrollplan.beskrivelse: The control plan links checklists to specific areas, deadlines and responsible trade groups. Each cell represents a control point that a trade group must complete by the deadline.
hjelp.kontrollplan.matriseBeskrivelse: Rows are areas (bathroom, basement, fire cell), columns are checklists. Colors show status: gray = planned, blue = in progress, yellow = completed, green = approved, red = overdue, lock = blocked by dependency.
hjelp.kontrollplan.milepelBeskrivelse: Milestones group control points with a common goal, e.g. 'Foundation complete — week 22'. Progress is shown as percentage of approved points.
maskin.ingenUtstyrBeskrivelse: Start by registering vehicles, heavy machinery or small equipment owned by the company.
maskin.hentFraVegvesenKommerSnart: Vegvesen lookup comes in the next phase — fill in manually for now
maskin.eierskap.label: Ownership
maskin.vegvesen.hentInnHint: Type a registration number (e.g. AB12345) and click "Fetch from Vegvesen" to retrieve vehicle info automatically.
maskin.vegvesen.ingenTreff: Vehicle not found in Vegvesen's registry. Check the registration number.
maskin.vegvesen.alleredeRegistrert: Vehicle is already registered for your company.
maskin.vegvesen.rateLimit: Vegvesen API is temporarily overloaded. Try again in a few minutes.
maskin.vegvesen.feil: Could not contact Vegvesen. Try again later.
maskin.vegvesen.ugyldigRegnr: Invalid registration number. Format: 2 letters + 4–5 digits (e.g. AB12345).
maskin.vegvesen.forhandsvisning.kilde: Retrieved from Norwegian Public Roads Administration
maskin.vegvesen.oppdater.lagtIKo: Update queued — processed within a few minutes
maskin.filter.sokPlaceholder: Search make, model, reg. no., intern. no.…
maskin.filter.justerFilter: Adjust the filter or reset to see all machines.
maskin.detalj.utgaattAdvarsel: Expired is permanent. The machine is hidden from default lists but kept for audit, insurance, and warranty purposes.
maskin.detalj.utgaattGrunnPaakrevd: You must select a reason when setting status to expired.
maskin.detalj.tilleggsansvarligeKommer: Additional responsibles can be managed after the next update.
maskin.detalj.rediger.kjoretoyMerknad: Vegvesen data (VIN, vehicle group, engine specs) is updated via the "Update from Vegvesen" button — not manually here.
firma.maskin.import.velgFirma: Select a customer company from the top menu before importing the equipment register.
firma.maskin.ingenTilgangOpprett: You do not have access to create or import equipment. Contact a company administrator.
firma.maskin.import.steg1.beskrivelse: Select an .xlsx file exported from SmartDok. The file must contain Maskin and Internnummer columns.
firma.maskin.import.steg1.dropTittel: Drag and drop Excel file here
firma.maskin.import.feil.kunXlsx: Only .xlsx files are supported for SmartDok import.
firma.maskin.import.varsel.duplikaterBes: Internal numbers already registered in the company are skipped during import.
firma.maskin.import.varsel.ansvarligeUma: {{antall}} responsible person(s) not matched against users
Equipment with these responsibles is imported without an assigned user. You can assign manually after import.
firma.maskin.import.flereRader: Showing {{vist}} of {{totalt}} rows. All are imported on confirmation.
firma.maskin.import.steg3.vegvesenKo: queued for Vegvesen lookup (low priority, spread over time)
firma.maskin.import.steg3.advarsel: Import is atomic — all or nothing. You can correct fields afterwards via the equipment detail page.
firma.maskin.import.steg4.umatchaBeskriv: Assign these manually via the equipment detail page or invite the users first.
firma.integrasjoner.beskrivelse: Configure external services for your company. API keys are stored encrypted and never shown in plaintext after saving.
firma.integrasjoner.velgFirma: Select a company from the top menu to manage integrations.
firma.integrasjoner.bekreftFjern: Remove the saved key? The integration will stop working.
firma.integrasjoner.placeholderEksistere: Paste a new key to replace the existing one
firma.integrasjoner.ingenAktive: No company-level integrations configured yet. Reginn MREG (equipment data) becomes available here once the API endpoints are ready.
brreg.hint: Enter a 9-digit org. number to fetch from Brønnøysund
admin.integrasjoner.beskrivelse: Overview of platform integrations and encryption configuration.
admin.integrasjoner.firmaBeskrivelse: Per-company integrations are managed on the company settings page. The admin view will be added later.
admin.integrasjoner.vegvesen.beskrivelse: Vehicle lookup by registration number. Shared platform key.
admin.integrasjoner.kryptering.beskrivel: Master key for AES-256-GCM encryption of stored API keys.
firma.varelager.tom.beskrivelse: Click "Add item" or import from SmartDok.
firma.varelager.felt.enhetForslag: Suggested: m, m², m³, kg, tonn, stk, sekk, liter
firma.varelager.deaktiver.bekreft: Deactivate this item? Historical consumption rows are preserved.
firma.varelager.kategori.tom: No categories yet. Add a category to organize items.
firma.varelager.kategori.felt.kontonumme: Used for export to ProAdm/Tripletax. Optional.
firma.varelager.kategori.slett.bekreft: Delete this category? Cannot be deleted if items are linked.
firma.varelager.modulIkkeAktivert.beskri: Activate the Materials module on the Modules page to use the catalog and consumption tracking.
firma.varelager.import.steg1.dropKlikk: Drop the file here, or click to choose
firma.varelager.import.feil.kunSpreadshe: The file must be a SpreadsheetML file (.xls or .xml).
firma.varelager.import.varsel.heatworkBe: Rental equipment (per hour/day) is registered in the Equipment register with erUtleieobjekt=true, not in the materials catalog. These rows must be created manually as Equipment after import.
firma.varelager.import.varsel.duplikater: Items that already exist with the same name and unit are skipped during import.
firma.varelager.import.steg3.heatworkUte: Heatwork rental rows are excluded (create manually as Equipment)
firma.varelager.import.steg3.advarsel: The import is atomic — everything goes in together, or nothing if anything fails.
firma.varelager.import.steg4.heatworkBes: Create these as Equipment rows in the equipment register with erUtleieobjekt=true. Set category=small equipment, type=Heatwork model, and use the internal number from the name field.
firma.hms.beskrivelse: Aggregated HSE status across company projects.
firma.hms.tom.dokumenter: No HSE documents match the filter.
firma.hms.ingenTilgang: You don't have access to the company HSE overview. Requires company-admin or HSE-responsible role.
firma.hms.hurtig.beskrivelse: Change status and add an internal comment without leaving the company overview. Use drill-down for full processing.
firma.hms.hurtig.kommentarPlaceholder: Note visible in the incident's comment log …
firma.hms.hurtig.maaVelge: Select a new status or write a comment
firma.hms.hurtig.kunAvvik: Quick handling is only available for HSE incidents.
firma.kalender.beskrivelse: Public holidays, common vacation, half-days and summer/winter periods for the company.
firma.kalender.deaktiverBekreft: Deactivate «{{navn}}»? The entry is kept as inactive (audit trail) and is skipped on re-import.
firma.kalender.datoIkkeRedigerbar: The date cannot be changed. Create a new entry and deactivate this one if the date needs to change.
firma.kalender.felt.tidsperiodeBeskrivel: Sets working hours that deviate from the company default. For sommertid_start: applies until sommertid_slutt. For halvdag: applies only this day.
firma.kalender.feil.timerOverstyrPaakrev: Hours must be set for a half-day.
firma.kalender.feil.pauseMinUgyldig: Break must be between 0 and 480 minutes.
firma.kalender.sommertidAdvarsel.bareSta: You have set sommertid_start but are missing sommertid_slutt for the year. Add the end date so that auto-allocation works.
firma.kalender.sommertidAdvarsel.bareSlu: You have set sommertid_slutt but are missing sommertid_start for the year. Add the start date so that auto-allocation works.
vareforbruk.tom.beskrivelse: Click "Register consumption" to add the first row.
vareforbruk.modulIkkeAktivert.beskrivels: Activate the Materials module in firma administration to register consumption.
firma.timer.standard.erValgt: Default pay type for new time rows
firma.timer.standard.settValgt: Set as default for new time rows
timer.hjemChip.startGpsHint: GPS tracking on the ongoing day
firma.oppmotested.beskrivelse: Fixed meeting points (offices) with GPS radius. Used to recognise where an employee starts the day.
firma.oppmotested.velgFirma: Select a company to manage meeting points.
firma.oppmotested.koordinatHjelp: Coordinates (decimal degrees). Find them on a map or your phone.
firma.oppmotested.hjelp.hva: Meeting points are the company's fixed offices or workshops. Each has a GPS position and a radius (geofence).
firma.oppmotested.hjelp.gps: When an employee starts the day in the app, the phone recognises which meeting point they are within and suggests it. This is only a suggestion — hours are never created automatically.
firma.oppmotested.hjelp.personvern: The position is used locally on the phone as documentation of where the day started. It is not a basis for pay, and pay is always anchored to the employment contract.
firma.oppmotested.hjelp.adresse: Enter the address and click “Geocode” to fetch the coordinates automatically. You can fine-tune by clicking the map or editing the coordinates directly.
firma.oppmotested.geokodIngen: No match found for the address. Adjust it, or place the point manually on the map.
firma.oppmotested.kartHjelp: Click or drag the marker to adjust the position. The circle shows the geofence radius.
timer.maskinforerbevis.arbeider: Machine work is being logged without a registered operator certificate. Flagged for your manager's visibility.
timer.maskinforerbevis.leder: Machine work without a registered operator certificate — flagged for visibility.
innstillinger.undertekst: All company and project settings in one place.
innstillinger.velgProsjekt: Select a project to see project settings.
innstillinger.hjelp.tekst: All settings are gathered here, split into Company (applies to the whole company) and Project (applies to the selected project). Search at the top to find things quickly. Cards you don't have access to are hidden.
innstillinger.firmaprofil.beskrivelse: Company info, org. no. and billing
innstillinger.sokeord.byggeplasser: locations drawings map geofence area site
innstillinger.moduler.beskrivelse: Turn project modules on and off
